about.title: About Chiaki - Chiaki Inari Shrine
about.description: Hello, I’m Chiaki Suzukaze: an illustrator, designer, and programmer.

story.title: Story - Chiaki Inari Shrine
story.description: A story where Chiaki Inari Shrine, Tokoyo, and human memory intersect.

character.title: Characters - Chiaki Inari Shrine
character.description: Head of Chiaki Inari Shrine’s First Laboratory and the ▓▓th shrine maiden: Chiaki Suzukaze.

art.title: Chiaki Suzukaze’s Art - Chiaki Inari Shrine
art.description: A gallery of Chiaki Suzukaze’s character illustrations and creative work.

works.title: Works - Chiaki Inari Shrine
works.description: Software, tools, and interfaces designed and developed by Chiaki.

chiakey.title: ChiaKey - Chiaki Inari Shrine
chiakey.description: A modern Traditional Chinese Zhuyin input method for macOS, based on Yahoo! KeyKey’s open-source code.

kumiko.title: Kumiko Font Editor - Chiaki Inari Shrine
kumiko.description: A font editor and glyph-completion tool that runs entirely in the browser.

tgJpg.title: tg.jpg Telegram Bot - Chiaki Inari Shrine
tgJpg.description: A Telegram bot that replies with the first usable image-search result for .jpg.

splitFlap.title: react-split-flap - Chiaki Inari Shrine
splitFlap.description: A React component that recreates station split-flap displays.

tokyonoSora.title: Tokyono Sora - Chiaki Inari Shrine
tokyonoSora.description: A CSS theme that redesigns the Plurk timeline.

fonts.title: Fonts - Chiaki Inari Shrine
fonts.description: Typefaces designed or co-created by Chiaki.

akitra.title: Taiwan Railways Typeface - Chiaki Inari Shrine
akitra.description: A typeface based on lettering found on Taiwan Railways rolling stock.

nixie.title: AkiNixie - Chiaki Inari Shrine
nixie.description: A numeral typeface that recreates the warm orange glow of Nixie tubes.

huninn.title: jf open Huninn - Chiaki Inari Shrine
huninn.description: A Taiwanese open-source rounded typeface by justfont.

home.title: Chiaki Inari Shrine
home.lead: Chiaki Inari Shrine is an independent circle exploring technology, type design, and subculture.
home.body: Born from a love of open source and fan culture, the circle works across illustration, merchandise, software engineering, open-source typefaces, and model making.

worksPage.title: Works
worksPage.intro: Bringing familiar tools to new systems, making complex creation easier, or simply making a screen you open every day a little more beautiful.

fontsPage.title: Fonts
fontsPage.intro: From lettering found on Taiwan Railways, to Nixie-tube numerals and an open-source rounded typeface refined for Taiwan, every typeface begins with a particular culture and experience.
